zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Tooley於1616年8月16日出生在英國素可貝可爾時，她的父親Thomas Tooley31歲，母親Rebecca Lynn Eyre28歲。她於大約1640年與John Peabody結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1677年之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特米德萊托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Tooley于1616年8月16日出生在英国素可貝可爾时，她的父亲Thomas Tooley31岁，母亲Rebecca Lynn Eyre28岁。她于大约1640年与John Peabody结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1677年之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特米德萊托。

nameMeanings.name: Tooley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk and Lincolnshire): variant of   Tolley  .

variants.name: Towle
meanings: from Middle English Tolle or Tole, usually a pet form of Anglo-Norman Torald, a well-used personal name by the Normans in Normandy and England and ultimately from Old Norse Thóraldr(Thórr the god Thor + vald ‘power, rule’). Middle English Tole was also an Anglicized form of Old Norse Tóli (see Tooley ) and could alternatively have derived from Old English Tola. Compare Tolson .

variants.name: Tull
meanings: English (Hampshire and Berkshire): from the Middle English personal name Tulle (Old English Tulla, perhaps a form of Old Norse Tóli; compare Tooley ).
South German: nickname for a stubborn man, Tull.

South German (Tüll): nickname for someone who was patient, from Middle High German dult ‘patience’; or from a personal name formed with the same word; or from Middle High German tult, dult ‘fair, festival’ (Bavarian Dult). The surname Tüll is rare in Austria and virtually non-existing in Germany.

variants.name: O'Toole
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Caitlin, Eamonn, Eoin, Kelan, Kieran, Michael Patrick, Niall, Patrick James, Peadar, Siobhan.

Irish (Dublin): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tuathail ‘descendant of Tuathal’, an ancient Celtic personal name based on tuath ‘people’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Compare Toland . This name has also been erroneously associated with Gaelic tuile ‘flood’ and therefore occasionally Anglicized as Flood .

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Tooley was born on 16 August 1616, in Bexhill, Sussex, England, her father, Thomas Tooley, was 31 and her mother, Rebecca Lynn Eyre, was 28. She married John Peabody about 1640. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 8 daughters. She died before 1677, in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, and was buried in Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Tooley est née le 16 août 1616, à Bexhill, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Tooley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Lynn Eyre, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Peabody environ 1640. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1677, à Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Tooley am 16. August 1616 in Bexhill, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Tooley 31 und ihre Mutter Rebecca Lynn Eyre 28. Sie hat um 1640 John Peabody geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 8 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1677 in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Tooley è nata il il 16 agosto 1616 nel Bexhill, Sussex, England, sua padre, Thomas Tooley, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Rebecca Lynn Eyre, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Peabody circa 1640. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 8 figlie. Morì prima del 1677, nel Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Tooleyが1616年8月16日にイギリススセックスベクスヒルで生まれた時，父Thomas Tooleyは31歳，母Rebecca Lynn Eyreは28歳であった。約1640年にJohn Peabodyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1677年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトミッドレトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Tooley(이)가 1616년 8월 16일 영국 수세스 브스힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Tooley(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rebecca Lynn Eyre(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1640년 John Peabody(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1677년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 미들레타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Tooley nasceu em 16 de agosto de 1616, em Bexhill, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Tooley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Lynn Eyre, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Peabody aproximadamente 1640. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1677, em Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Tooley родилась 16 августа 1616 г. в местности бексхилл, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Tooley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Lynn Eyre, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Peabody около 1640 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 8 дочерей. Она умерла перед 1677 г. в местности нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности миддлетоун, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothy Tooley nació el 16 de agosto de 1616, en Bexhill, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Tooley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Rebecca Lynn Eyre, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Peabody aproximadamente 1640. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 8 hijas. Murió antes de 1677, en Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.
